data.title: U.S. consumer confidence plummets, crypto markets remain strong after tariffs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. consumer confidence has dropped sharply. The latest survey by the University of Michigan shows that consumer sentiment has dropped from 57.0 to 50.8, close to the lowest level in three years, and inflation expectations have soared to 6.7% in the next year. At the same time, investors have sold U.S. government bonds and dollars, causing gold prices to hit a record high of $3,240 per ounce. The cryptocurrency market performed well, with Bitcoin rising 4% and stabilizing at $82,000, and mainstream tokens SOL and AVAX rising 6% each. Some analysts believe that market volatility is due to the withdrawal of highly leveraged market participants rather than fundamental changes. (CoinDesk)

data.title: A whale sold 274,188 SOL in three days, losing nearly $11 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale continued to sell SOL to stop losses. In the past three days, the whale sold 274,188 SOL at an average price of $108, worth $29.64 million.
The whale's SOL holdings were transferred from OKX seven months ago, when the price was $148, and the whale lost nearly $11 million.

data.title: U.S. Consumer Confidence Drops as Inflation Expectations Rise
data.description:
According to Odaily, consumer confidence in the United States has significantly declined, with the University of Michigan's latest survey indicating a drop in consumer sentiment from 57.0 to 50.8, nearing its lowest level in nearly three years. Additionally, inflation expectations for the coming year have surged to 6.7%.

In response, investors have been selling off U.S. government bonds and the dollar, leading to a historic high in gold prices, reaching $3,240 per ounce. Meanwhile, the cryptocurrency market has shown strong performance, with Bitcoin rising by 4% to stabilize at $82,000. Major tokens SOL and AVAX have also seen increases of 6% each.

Some analysts suggest that the market volatility is due to the exit of highly leveraged market participants rather than changes in fundamentals.

data.title: U.S. Stock Market Sees Gains Led by Tech and Cryptocurrency Stocks
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the U.S. stock market experienced significant gains during trading, with the Nasdaq Composite rising by 1.49%, the S&P 500 increasing by 1.25%, and the Dow Jones Industrial Average climbing 0.8%. Cryptocurrency-related stocks saw widespread increases, with MicroStrategy (MSTR) surging 8.27% and MARA Holdings (MARA) up by 3.8%.

Technology stocks also showed strong performance. Microsoft (MSFT) rose by 1.55%, Apple (AAPL) gained 3.67%, Google (GOOG) increased by 2.9%, and Nvidia (NVDA) was up 2.58%. However, Meta Platforms (META) saw a decline of 0.9%, and Tesla (TSLA) fell by 2.4%. Amazon (AMZN) experienced a modest increase of 0.7%.

data.description:

The new blockchain, now operating as a high-performance Layer 1 network, aims to rival traditional payment networks like Visa in transaction speed. Trading volume soared from. . .

data.title: Crypto-friendly Canadian Prime Ministerial Candidate Poilievre’s Support Slumps
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Protos, the support rate of Poilievre, the Canadian prime ministerial candidate who supports Bitcoin, has dropped sharply from 93% to 25%. Carney, who is currently supported by Trump, has become the most popular candidate with a support rate of 76%. Poilievre previously advocated the "decentralization" of Canadian finance through Bitcoin, while Carney supports the development of central bank digital currency (CBDC).

data.title: White Hat Hacker Front-Runs Morpho Exploit, Rescues $2.6M in Crypto
data.description:
A white hat MEV operator intercepted $2. 6 million in stolen crypto during a Morpho Protocol exploit, highlighting the increasing role of ethical hackers in DeFi security.

The post White Hat Hacker Front-Runs Morpho Exploit, Rescues $2. 6M in Crypto first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/04/11/white-hat-hacker-fronts-morpho-exploit/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=white-hat-hacker-fronts-morpho-exploit

data.title: Hollywood Films Capture Only 5% of China’s Box Office Amid New Import Restrictions
data.description:
China's latest move to restrict Hollywood film imports in response to U. S. tariffs is expected to have a limited financial impact on the American film industry.
source: https://tokenist.com/hollywood-films-capture-only-5-of-chinas-box-office-amid-new-import-restrictions/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=hollywood-films-capture-only-5-of-chinas-box-office-amid-new-import-restrictions
